monitor_the_situation.title: Suspects Attack Border Police at Kalandiya Checkpoint
Iran Strikes Two Commercial Ships With Missiles in Strait of Hormuz, US Says
— S3 · Conflict · Bab el-Mandeb · 7h ago. UKMTO warning 080-26 reports a maritime attack near the Bab el-Mandeb strait. Vessels advised to exercise caution.
Qatari LNG Tanker Sends Mayday After Possible Strike in Strait of Hormuz
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 8h ago. Qatari LNG tanker AL REKAYYAT broadcasts mayday after possible projectile strike in the Strait of Hormuz. Vessel had AIS off for 18 days.
